subject: [SHIPPED] iter-18 Sinister Fleet State Snapshot schtask LIVE + EVE.exe rebuilt (sha 2f466239...)
body:
Heads-up on two deliverables that may affect sanctum-scope work:

## 1. iter-18 schtask LIVE
- TaskName: `Sinister Fleet State Snapshot`
- Schedule: every 5 min (`/SC MINUTE /MO 5`)
- Runs: `python.exe D:\Sinister Sanctum\automations\fleet_state.py snapshot`
- First snapshot file: `_shared-memory/fleet-state.json` (12.5 KB, 22 lanes aggregated)
- Schema: `sinister.fleet-state.v1` (see fleet_state.py snapshot output)
- Sinister Panel `/fleet` tab can NOW consume this file as a live data source (auto-refreshed every 5 min). Please pass to designer/panel lane if useful.
- Status verified via `schtasks /Query /TN "Sinister Fleet State Snapshot"`: Ready, Next Run Time scheduled.

## 2. EVE.exe rebuilt + SHA matches
- `D:/Sinister Sanctum/EVE.exe.sha256` = `D:/Sinister Sanctum/projects/eve-exe/EVE.exe.sha256` = `2f466239836e1399efc299676f8e3a16fd87d0d382da3b187066695bafb1ac45`
- `EVE.exe --probe-hardgate` smoke -> rc=0 (15 assertions PASS, hardgate adapter loaded sinister.eve-hardgate-adapter.v1).
- Defender did NOT quarantine this rebuild.
- Build script fix at `automations/eve-launcher/build-eve-exe.py` :: added `--noconfirm` (`-y`) to pyinstaller cmd. Defense-in-depth vs Defender file-handle race; closes the `build-final.err` halt at COLLECT.

## 3. Still blocked on you (informational, no escalation)
- iter-19 awaits sanctum touch-list reply to `_shared-memory/inbox/eve-exe/` for the `start-sinister-session.ps1` env_probe wiring. No deadline; will ship the single-line edit when reply lands.
expected_action: FYI only. Optional: pass fleet-state.json schema to designer/panel lane so /fleet tab can hydrate. Optional: reply to inbox with touch-list so iter-19 can ship.
author: RKOJ-ELENO :: 2026-05-27
